name: Rueben Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Corned beef brisket, thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Place bread cubes in a shallow baking dish (2-5 quarts) and bake for 10 minutes until crisp.
3. In a bowl, combine apples, onion, sauerkraut, mustard, mayonnaise, and half of the cheese.
4. Spread half of this mixture over the bread cubes.
5. Coarsely chop the corned beef and spread evenly over the mixture.
6. Top with remaining apple mixture.
7. Cover tightly with foil and bake for 50-60 minutes until apples are tender.
8. Remove foil and sprinkle remaining bread and top with remaining cheese.
9. Bake uncovered for an additional 20 minutes until cheese is melted and browned.
